Petition For Final Distribution On Waiver Of Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Final Distribution On Waiver Of Accounting
Off Calendar Oct-30-2018 Continued To Nov-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Final Distribution On Waiver Of Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Continued To Oct-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Final Distribution On Waiver Of Accounting
Off Calendar Aug-15-2018 Continued To Sep-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Valaida Mason in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it now has a second amended petition and that the remaining concern is protecting Woody's right to occupancy. Ms. Mason stated that Woody was living in the property when her Mom passed away, that he continues to live there and that she does not think any of the Siblings have a problem with it. The Court stated that the Siblings could change their minds, that Woody has a right to be there, that it is a provision in the will, spoke of having a deed which includes language protecting Woody's right to occupancy, stated that it can not approve what it has in front of it right now and that Ms. Mason will have to come back with an amended petition that properly protects Woody's rights. The Court strongly urged Ms. Mason to seek Counsel. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to September 26, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Final Distribution On Waiver Of Accounting
Off Calendar Aug-01-2018 Continued To Aug-15-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Final Distribution On Waiver Of Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-18-2018 Continued To Aug-01-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Final Distribution On Waiver Of Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-21-2018 Continued To Jul-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Final Distribution On Waiver Of Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Continued To Mar-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Valaida Mason in Propria Persona.

Ms. Mason stated that she is going to consult a Paralegal and that she is clear on what needs to be done. The Court informed Ms. Mason that she needs to amend the petition. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to March 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Final Distribution On Waiver Of Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-25-2017 Continued To Jan-08-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Valaida Mason in Propria Persona.

The Court informed Ms. Mason that she can not close the Estate without distributing the Lake County property, that the other property needs to be distributed, made reference to the life estate, and reminded her of the notice requirement under probate Code 9202 (a),(B) and (c) with respect to creditor's claims, requests for special notice and assignments. Ms. Mason stated that she understands. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Accounting is continued to January 8, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Final Distribution On Waiver Of Accounting

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory & Appraisal.
Off Calendar Aug-10-2015 Continued To Aug-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Valaida S. Mason, Petitioner in pro per
The Court inquired regarding the status of filing the Inventory and Appraisal. Ms. Mason informed the Court that she was awaiting the appraisal for property in Lake County to be completed. The matter was continued to 2015 at August 24, 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares.
